data.title: Healthpeak Properties Declares Monthly Common Stock Cash Dividends for the Second Quarter of 2026
data.description: In Denver, Healthpeak Properties, Inc. declared a monthly common stock cash dividend of $0.10167 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This dividend was announced on April 6, 2026, by the Board of Directors. It will be payable to stockholders of record on specified dates, as shown in the table below:- Record Date: [Date]- Payment Date: [Date]Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC) is a prominent owner, operator, and developer of real estate for healthcare purposes. This monthly dividend payment is part of the company's ongoing commitment to its shareholders.

data.title: BXP to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: Boston-based BXP, Inc., a major developer, owner, and manager of top workplaces in the U.S., revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, after NYSE trading hours. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 10:00 A.M. Eastern Time to delve into the results and give an overview of the company. Interested participants can join in to learn more. BXP, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BXP.

data.title: Marcus Theatres Blasts to Highest Grossing Five-Day Easter Weekend
data.description: In Milwaukee, Marcus Theatres®, the fourth largest theater circuit in the US and a division of Marcus Corporation (NYSE: MCS), achieved a landmark by generating its highest revenue during the five-day Easter holiday weekend. This success was largely attributed to the popularity of The Super Mario Galaxy Movie and a range of other films in their lineup. Mario enthusiasts, along with a diverse audience of various age groups and backgrounds, flocked to the theaters, contributing to the record-breaking performance. The enthusiastic response to the movies is evidenced by the energetic cheer of "let’s-a go" from Mario fans and the overall rush of moviegoers attending the screenings.

data.title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: A leading real estate company, AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. (NYSE: AVB), is set to announce its first quarter 2026 earnings on April 27, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call will be held on April 28, 2026, at 1:00 PM Eastern Time (ET) to discuss the results. For those interested in participating, the domestic contact number is (877) 407-9716, and for international participants, the number is (201) 493-6779. Additionally, the webcast can be accessed at https://investors.avalonbay.com. A replay of the conference call will also be available, and the domestic replay number is (844) 512-29.

data.title: HelloNation Article Featuring Insurance Expert Jose Gomez Breaks Down Airbnb Coverage Needs
data.description: A recent article discusses insurance requirements, liability concerns, and bundling options for hosts of short-term rentals. The piece, published on April 6, 2026, in Chicago, highlights the essential insurance coverage for Airbnb hosts in the city. HelloNation offers valuable insights on this topic, shedding light on the specific insurance needs of hosts.

data.title: Duolingo to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on Monday, May 4, 2026
data.description: Duolingo, Inc., a prominent mobile learning platform, is set to reveal its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The announcement is scheduled after the U.S. market closes on Monday, May 4, 2026. Interested individuals can join a video webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The company's stock is listed as DUOL on the Nasdaq exchange.

data.title: Qnity Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: Q) will announce its Q1 2026 financial results on May 12, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call will be held at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. To join, investors can dial (800) 343-5172 (US) or +1 (203) 518-9856 (international) using participant code QNITY. An audio-only live webcast and presentation materials will also be available during the call.

data.title: Cadence Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webcast
data.description: Cadence, ticker symbol CDNS on Nasdaq, is set to conduct a webcast on Monday, April 27, 2026, to present its financial results for the first quarter of that year.

data.title: Vero Fiber Expands Credit Facility for Further Network Growth
data.description: VFN Holdings, Inc. (Vero), a fiber infrastructure provider, has secured a $425 million debt facility to support its ongoing expansion of fiber networks and growth in the fiber-to-the-premise market. The facility can be increased to $585 million and will also be used for strategic acquisitions. This announcement was made on April 6, 2026, based in Boulder, Colo.

data.title: Wabash Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Wabash, traded on NYSE as WNC, based in Lafayette, Indiana, is set to webcast its quarterly earnings conference call to analyze its financial performance in Q1 2026. The webcast will take place on Friday, May 1, 2026, starting at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. This event aims to review and discuss the company's results and is expected to provide insights into its performance for the first quarter of the year.

data.title: Pre-Owned Jet, Piston-Single Aircraft, and Turboprop Inventory and Asking Prices Lower Than Last Year
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska on April 6, 2026, as per the recent aviation market reports by Sandhills Global in March, there has been a notable decrease in inventory levels and asking prices for pre-owned jets, piston-single aircraft, and turboprop aircraft. This decline has been observed on Controller.com and other Sandhills platforms compared to the previous year. The data points towards a decrease in available aircraft for sale and a reduction in the prices being asked for these aircraft.

data.title: Uniti Group Inc. To Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call
data.description: Little Rock-based company Uniti Group Inc. (Nasdaq: UNIT) is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 before trading begins on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange on May 11, 2026. The announcement will be followed by a conference call at 8:30 AM Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the earnings report.

data.title: Silo Pharma Receives European Patent Allowance for Licensed Novel PTSD Prevention Therapy
data.description: The European Patent Office has approved claims related to the preventive application of therapy targeting the 5-HT4 pathway. This decision has expanded Silo Pharma's intellectual property portfolio. This development underscores the potential for utilizing treatments focused on the 5-HT4 pathway for preventive purposes.

data.title: MidCap Financial Investment Corporation Schedules Earnings Release and Conference Call for Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: On April 6th, 2026, MidCap Financial Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: MFIC) revealed plans to release its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled to be disclosed after the Nasdaq Global Select Market closes on May 6, 2026.

data.title: Celestica Q1 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call Tuesday, April 28, 2026
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Celestica Inc. (traded on TSX and NYSE as CLS) announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 post-market closure on April 27, 2026. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call on April 28, 2026, at 8:00 am ET. This information was shared by the company, and investors can anticipate the detailed report on this specified date.

data.title: Solana (SOL) Foundation introduces STRIDE Security Program for 24/7 threat monitoring. Free for $10M+ TVL protocols and formal verification for $100M+ protocols.
data.description: The SOL Foundation has recently introduced security initiatives called STRIDE and SIRN. These programs provide complementary services for protocols with a Total Value Locked (TVL) of more than $10 million. STRIDE offers free threat monitoring, while SIRN offers formal verification for protocols with a TVL exceeding $100 million. This initiative aims to enhance security measures for prominent protocols within the blockchain space.

data.title: Albemarle Corporation to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
data.description: Albemarle Corporation, a prominent company in supplying vital elements for various industries, is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6. The announcement will be made post the closure of NYSE trading. Based in Charlotte, N.C., Albemarle Corporation operates as a global leader and is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALB. The company's diverse offerings cater to the needs of industries such as mobility, energy, connectivity, and health. This disclosure of earnings will provide investors and stakeholders with crucial insights into Albemarle Corporation's performance during this period.

data.title: FS Credit Opportunities Corp. (FSCO) Declares Distribution for April 2026
data.description: The Fund, FS Credit Opportunities Corp. (NYSE: FSCO), declared its monthly distribution for April 2026 with a payout of $0.0583 per share. Shareholders can expect to receive this distribution on April 30, 2026. More details regarding the distribution can be found...

data.title: Tapestry, Inc. Appoints Matt Madrigal to Board of Directors
data.description: Tapestry, Inc., a renowned designer of accessories and lifestyle brands traded on NYSE under TPR, disclosed the addition of Matt Madrigal, the Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. traded under PINS, to its Board of Directors. This move, effective immediately, increases the Board's count to eleven, with ten directors classified as independent. Tapestry expressed satisfaction in having Mr. Madrigal onboard, highlighting his proficiency in technology and enhancing customer experiences.

data.title: Assurant to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Assurant, a top global protection company, will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results (NYSE: AIZ) on May 5, 2026, post-market close. Interested individuals can access the news on Assurant's website. A conference call will be held the next day, May 6, for further insights.
